items.title: Flaky test in the sync engine
items.author: maintainer

items.title: Add incremental sync cadence
items.body:
Provider body for the issue.

- Define the incremental loop cadence.
- Keep full sweeps as the disappearance-safety boundary.
items.author: maintainer

items.title: WIP: incremental loop cadence
items.body:
Provider body for the PR/MR.

## Summary

Adds the incremental loop cadence while preserving the writer-owned sync boundary.
items.author: reviewer

items.title: GitLab: scoped labels are mutually exclusive
items.author: gitlab-user

comments.author: reviewer
comments.body: Looks good after the retry guard.

comments.author: reviewer
comments.body: Cache the compiled pattern so the loop does not rebuild it on every tick.

comments.author: maintainer
comments.body: I will move this next to the scheduler state.

comments.author: reviewer
comments.body: Please keep the incremental fetch from deleting unseen rows.

comments.author: maintainer
comments.body: The README should mention the cadence knob.

comments.author: reviewer
comments.body: This design note is now clear.

comments.author: reviewer
comments.body: Resolved after the range endpoint kept the same projection.

comments.author: reviewer
comments.body: This retry policy still hides the provider status code.
